version_description: Easy version of this song. Enjoy.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1: Maddie, both]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
Hey momma, how do you get a red wine stain[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Out of your favorite dress?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]
Black mascara off a pillowcase?[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Cure a one-too-many headache?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
Momma can I come and maybe stay a few days[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
This weekend or next?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
And hey, how do you get a red wine stain[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Out of your favorite dress[/tab]


[Chorus: both]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
How does he sleep at night?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]
Momma, the nerve of this guy[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
To leave me so easy[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Am I gonna be alright?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
I wanna kick myself for falling so hard[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Momma, can you die from a broken heart?[/tab]


[Verse 2: Maddie, both]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
Can you ask Daddy if he's got time[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
To come and look at my front door?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]
It got slammed last night[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
And now it don't close right[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                                            [ch]C[/ch]
And just promise that you won't tell him everything[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
And keep that pistol in the drawer[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]
Momma, please don't say[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]
I'm gonna laugh about this someday[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
You didn't see the way he drove away[/tab]


[Chorus: both]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
How does he sleep at night?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
Momma, the nerve of this guy[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]
To leave me so easy[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
Am I gonna be alright?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                                 [ch]C[/ch]
I wanna kick myself for falling so hard[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Momma, can you die from a broken heart?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, a broken heart[/tab]


[Bridge: Maddie, Tae, both]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
Can your knees give out from prayin' so hard?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
(Prayin' so hard)[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]C[/ch]
Can you go blind from crying in the dark?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]
(In the dark)[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]
Was it ever really real[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
If he don't feel like I feel?[/tab]


[Chorus: Maddie, both]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
How does he sleep at night?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
Momma, the nerve of this guy[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]
To leave me so easy[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
Am I gonna be alright?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
How does he sleep at night?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]
Momma, the nerve of this guy[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]
To leave me so easy[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
Am I gonna be alright?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
I wanna kick myself for falling so hard[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Momma, can you die from a broken heart?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
A broken heart[/tab]
